name: The9 Limited
summary: The9 Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates and develops online games in the People's Republic of China. The company offers multiplayer online games, mobile games, and TV games. It also develops CrossFire New Mobile Game. The company was formerly known as GameNow.net Limited and changed its name to The9 Limited in February 2004. The9 Limited was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
